tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def not-done-issues (filter (fn [issue] (not= (:state issue) "done")) linear-issues))
(def not-done-ids (set (map :id not-done-issues)))
(def matching-prs (filter (fn [pr] (contains? not-done-ids (:closes_linear pr))) prs-with-linear))
(map (fn [pr] {:pr-number (:number pr) :linear-id (:closes_linear pr)}) matching-prs)"}
